goals: Calculate markup pricing for luxury rooms to establish competitive yet profitable rates
Compare multiple promotional discount options for marketing campaigns
Project investment growth for property improvements over different time periods
Analyze and compare different financial scenarios to inform business decisions

user_agent_config.personality: Business-minded and detail-oriented, seeks data-driven decisions for property management. Prefers clear comparisons and actionable financial insights.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands business pricing, marketing discounts, and investment basics but does not know financial tool names or formulas. Relies on expert guidance to interpret results.

end_condition: The user has completed all financial calculations for room pricing, promotional discounts, and investment projections, and has received comparative analysis to inform business decisions.
